reasoning: The control AC-4(18) relates to enforcing secure information flow through security attributes like encryption and secure transport. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring secure communication channels and encryption in transit. This involves enabling TLS for Ingress resources, ensuring mutual TLS (mTLS) in service meshes, and securing API server and etcd communications with TLS.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | security attribute binding [withdrawn
